notes: Level 6 manual review override shard for spell indexes 40-43 in generated discovery row order.
Terrain wall effects use schema-safe Square area shapes where TerrainEffect does not accept Wall; wall geometry remains preserved in targeting/spatialDetails and descriptions.

wall-of-ice::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses wall form and which side displaced creatures are pushed to; runtime represents form options and caster_choice push but lacks first-class wall-form choice and side-selection fields.
wall-of-ice::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add wall form and displacement side choice fields.
wall-of-ice::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallFormChoice and displacementSideChoice data.

wall-of-ice::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The initial Dexterity save and later Constitution save through frigid air are represented as DAMAGE effects.

wall-of-ice::forced_movement.issue: The creature pushed to one side of the wall is represented as MOVEMENT push with caster_choice direction.
wall-of-ice::forced_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional movement field required for this pass; first-class side choice is tracked under choice_or_mode.

wall-of-ice::terrain_or_surface.issue: Wall placement on a solid surface and alternate hemisphere/globe/panel geometry are represented, but TerrainEffect cannot encode Wall/Hemisphere forms directly and uses schema-safe Square for terrain effect geometry.
wall-of-ice::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add first-class wall/hemisphere/globe terrain effect shapes and solid-surface placement fields.

wall-of-ice::created_object_or_structure.issue: The ice wall, destructible sections, and frigid-air remains are represented, but runtime lacks first-class section destruction replacement fields.

wall-of-ice::object_stats_or_damageabili.issue: Wall section AC and HP are represented in wallProperties, but damage immunities and vulnerability are still prose because terrain wallProperties lacks immunity/vulnerability fields.
wall-of-ice::object_stats_or_damageabili.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object/terrain damage immunity and vulnerability fields.

wall-of-ice::environmental_change.issue: The frigid air left behind by destroyed wall sections is represented as a recurring Cold DAMAGE effect.
wall-of-ice::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate environmental field required for this pass.

wall-of-thorns::choice_or_mode.issue: Straight and circular wall forms are represented in spatialDetails and utility options.
wall-of-thorns::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.
wall-of-thorns::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by spatialDetails and UTILITY controlOptions.

wall-of-thorns::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The initial Piercing save and recurring Slashing save are represented as DAMAGE effects.

wall-of-thorns::terrain_or_surface.issue: The thorn wall, line-of-sight blocking, straight/circular forms, and slow movement are represented, but TerrainEffect cannot encode Wall/Ring forms directly and uses a schema-safe Square terrain shape.
wall-of-thorns::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add first-class wall/ring terrain effect shapes and line-of-sight-blocking terrain fields.
wall-of-thorns::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrainWallGeometry and blocksLineOfSight data.

wall-of-thorns::created_object_or_struct.issue: The created thorn wall is represented as TERRAIN plus utility options; it has no separate object HP/damage profile in canonical prose.
wall-of-thorns::created_object_or_struct.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional created-object field required for this pass.
wall-of-thorns::created_object_or_struct.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by TERRAIN and UTILITY effects.

wind-walk::choice_or_mode.issue: Choosing up to ten willing creatures plus the caster is represented by maxTargets 11 and utility options.
wind-walk::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by targeting.maxTargets and UTILITY controlOptions.

wind-walk::movement_or_repositioning.issue: Fly Speed 300 feet, hover, reverting forms, safe descent, and later fall are represented, but runtime lacks first-class movement mode, hover, transformation timing, and descent/fall aftermath fields.
wind-walk::movement_or_repositioning.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement mode, hover, transformation duration, safe descent, and fall aftermath fields.
wind-walk::movement_or_repositioning.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementModeSpeed, hover, transformationState, and onEndDescent data.

wind-walk::status_or_state_change.issue: Stunned during reversion is represented as STATUS_CONDITION; Prone immunity is encoded as DEFENSIVE immunity with a condition string because runtime lacks first-class condition immunity fields.
wind-walk::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by the Condition Immunities field, which separates Prone immunity from damage immunity.
wind-walk::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by moving Prone out of damageType and into conditionImmunity on the existing DEFENSIVE immunity effect.

wind-walk::damage_reduction_or_preventio.issue: Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage is represented as a DEFENSIVE resistance effect.

wind-walk::conditional_ending.issue: Reverting to cloud form and the end-of-effect safe descent/fall sequence are represented as utility options but need first-class transformation and on-end movement consequence fields.
wind-walk::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add transformation state and on-spell-end descent/fall fields.
wind-walk::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transformationState and onSpellEndMovementConsequence data.

word-of-recall::target_filter_or_eligibi.issue: Creatures appear in nearest unoccupied spaces near a prepared sanctuary; runtime represents teleport movement and options but lacks first-class sanctuary preparation and nearest-unoccupied placement fields.
word-of-recall::target_filter_or_eligibi.recommendedTemplateChange: Add prepared sanctuary and nearest-unoccupied destination fields.

word-of-recall::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched destination placement prose; there is no vision/light/sound mechanic beyond the teleport destination.

word-of-recall::travel_or_planar_movemen.issue: Teleport to a previously designated sanctuary is represented as MOVEMENT teleport, but runtime lacks first-class prepared-sanctuary state and no-effect-if-unprepared behavior.
word-of-recall::travel_or_planar_movemen.recommendedTemplateChange: Add prepared destination and no-effect-if-missing-prerequisite fields.
